description_long: This cabin features a sprawling, single-story structure with a dark, multi-gabled roof and prominent wooden beams supporting deep overhangs. The exterior walls are clad in natural wood, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance, while the roof is steeply pitched with several intersecting gables and a central dormer. Large, symmetrical windows are distributed across the front and rear facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front and back both showcase wide, covered porches supported by timber posts, providing sheltered outdoor living spaces. The cabin sits on a low, stone or concrete foundation, blending seamlessly with the surrounding landscape. Architectural details such as exposed trusses and decorative woodwork enhance its craftsman-inspired charm.
description: A spacious, single-story wooden cabin with a dark, multi-gabled roof, large windows, and wide covered porches supported by timber posts.
description_view_0: Front view showing a wide covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a central gable with exposed timber beams.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the porch, the overhanging roof, and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with another large covered porch, multiple windows, and a similar gabled roof structure as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the porch extension, side windows, and the continuation of the roof's overhang.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled roof with steep pitches, intersecting gables, and a central dormer, covered in dark shingles with deep overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on both the front and rear facades, with additional smaller windows on the sides; windows are grouped in pairs or threes under the gables
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front porch and another door centered on the rear porch, both aligned with the main gables
